title: Two Sum
description: Given an array and target, return indices of two numbers that add up to target using a seen set or hash map lookup.

title: Valid Anagram
description: Determine if two strings are anagrams by counting character frequency.

title: 3Sum
description: Given a sorted array idea, find triplets with pair sum using two pointers after sorting.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the longest substring without duplicate characters using a contiguous window and at most one copy of each character.

title: Search Insert Position
description: Given a sorted array, return the index where target is found or inserted. This is a boundary search.

title: Capacity To Ship Packages Within D Days
description: Find the minimum capacity so packages can be shipped within D days. A monotonic predicate checks if a capacity works.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Use a stack to validate matching parentheses and nested brackets.

title: Daily Temperatures
description: For each day, find the next greater temperature using a monotonic stack.

title: Linked List Cycle
description: Given a linked list, determine if it has a cycle using fast and slow pointers.

title: Path Sum
description: Given a binary tree root, determine whether a root-to-leaf path sum exists using recursive traversal.

title: Kth Smallest Element in a BST
description: Use the binary search tree sorted invariant to find the kth smallest value.

title: Number of Islands
description: Grid graph of land and water. Count connected components using visited-state DFS or BFS traversal.

title: Rotting Oranges
description: Find minimum steps until all oranges rot using level order BFS from multiple starting cells.

title: Network Delay Time
description: Given weighted graph edges, compute shortest path and minimum distance from a source using Dijkstra relaxation.

title: Course Schedule
description: Courses have prerequisites as directed edges. Determine if a topological ordering exists.

title: Redundant Connection
description: Detect the extra edge in an undirected graph using union find over connected components.

title: Jump Game
description: Decide if you can reach the end by keeping the farthest reachable index with a local greedy choice.

title: Merge Intervals
description: Given intervals, merge all overlapping intervals after sorting by start.

title: House Robber
description: Find maximum amount without adjacent houses.

title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
description: Choose items to reach a target sum using capacity state like subset sum.

title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
description: Find the longest increasing chain where best chain ending at each index can be computed.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Given two strings, find the longest common subsequence using a two-sequence DP table.

title: Burst Balloons
description: Use interval DP where each interval chooses a split point or last balloon to burst.

title: Count Numbers With Unique Digits
description: Digit DP over digits with tight bound and position state counts numbers.

title: Single Number
description: Use xor bit manipulation to find the value that appears once.

title: Subarray Sum Equals K
description: Use prefix sum and hash lookup of cumulative values to count subarrays equal to k.

title: Permutations
description: Generate every permutation through recursive choice exploration and backtracking.

title: Word Search II
description: Find words on a board using a trie prefix tree and DFS pruning.

title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
description: Find the minimum length contiguous subarray whose sum is at least target; positive numbers make a sliding window possible but binary search on answer can also work.

title: Search a 2D Matrix II
description: Rows and columns are sorted; search target by moving from a corner with monotonic pointer movement or by binary search per row.
